name: kupola-pivot-workspace
description: Workspace for Kupola PIVOT, a protocol-first, intent-driven runtime for secure AI-native web applications.

scripts.check: node --check packages/core/src/index.js && node --check packages/core/src/capability-registry.js && node --check packages/protocol/src/index.js && node --check packages/policy/src/index.js && node --check packages/orchestrator/src/index.js && node --check packages/ui/src/index.js && node --check test/smoke.mjs && node --check test/smoke-compatibility.mjs && node --check test/smoke-service-handoff.mjs && node --check test/smoke-fixtures.mjs && node --check test/smoke-command.mjs && node --check test/smoke-plan.mjs && node --check test/smoke-ui.mjs && node --check test/smoke-ai-workflow.mjs && npm run lint
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run smoke
